evidence.title: Wernher von Braun in the Apollo 11 First Moon Landing exhibition, Atlanta, September 25, 1969
evidence.description: PHOTO REMASTERED by Dan Beaumont UPI press agency: Atlanta, Dr., one of leaders in America's space flight program, took a walk on the moon. Dr. Von Braun strolled through an exact replica of the Apollo 11 moon landing mission after officially opening the exhibition at Atlanta's South eastern Fair. (AJPO92502) Dan Beaumont Space Museum INFO: www.flickr.com/photos/mrdanbeaumont/15112993063/sizes/o/ Von Braun, NASA documents and biography: history.msfc.nasa.gov/vonbraun/ Wernher von Braun: "Missile to Moon", documentary. PBS (2012) VIDEO: www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Ch0OgkkJKI Wernher von Braun rocket scientist VIDEO COLLECTION: www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL-HsE-FedVRg3kVyyhy5ohjoNV...
evidence.text:
Dan Beaumont Space Museum
Wernher von Braun in the Apollo 11 First Moon Landing exhibition, Atlanta, September 25, 1969
PHOTO REMASTERED by Dan Beaumont
UPI press agency: Atlanta, Dr., one of leaders in America's space flight program, took a walk on the moon. Dr. Von Braun strolled through an exact replica of the Apollo 11 moon landing mission after officially opening the exhibition at Atlanta's South eastern Fair. (AJPO92502)
Dan Beaumont Space Museum INFO: www.flickr.com/photos/mrdanbeaumont/15112993063/sizes/o/
Von Braun, NASA documents and biography: history.msfc.nasa.gov/vonbraun/
Wernher von Braun: "Missile to Moon", documentary. PBS (2012) VIDEO: www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Ch0OgkkJKI
Wernher von Braun rocket scientist VIDEO COLLECTION: www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL-HsE-FedVRg3kVyyhy5ohjoNV...
Wernher von Braun in the Apollo 11 First Moon Landing exhibition, Atlanta, September 25, 1969

UPI press agency: Atlanta, Dr., one of leaders in America's space flight program, took a walk on the moon. Dr. Von Braun strolled through an exact replica of the Apollo 11 moon landing mission after officially opening the exhibition at Atlanta's South eastern Fair. (AJPO92502)
Dan Beaumont Space Museum INFO: www.flickr.com/photos/mrdanbeaumont/15112993063/sizes/o/
